title: glossostigma spathulatum
intro: Glossostigma spathulatum, also known as Australian watercress or Glossostigma, is a type of aquatic plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Glossostigma spathulatum include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting relaxation. Glossostigma spathulatum can be prepared as an herbal supplement, typically in the form of capsules or tablets, or as a tea by steeping the dried leaves in hot water.
